calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-28-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Karla Davis.
Petitioner: Ellen Brownfain, present in pro per, as guardian ad litem for minor John Morgan FG Brownfain, was sworn and examined.
Order dispensing notice to the minor's father (name unknown) was signed in court.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: JohnJonah Laurence Brownfain.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-07-2006 Reset To Nov-28-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, VJ. Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Floyd Butler.
Petitioner: Ellen Brownfain, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: John Morgan Fg Brownfain, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent, proof of service or notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to Nov. 28, 2006 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit proof of service to the Minor's father of the new hearing date or an Application with Declaration for an Order dispensing with notice.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
